const loraTrainArray =[].map(i=>i.toLowerCase())

const loraTriggerWord = ""

const prefix = $json.style
const stylePromptsArray = promptsArray.map(p=>prefix+p)

const combined = []

const loraArrayWithTriggerWord = loraTrainArray.map(i=>i)

for (i in stylePromptsArray){
combined.push([stylePromptsArray[i],(i.toInt()+100)])
}

return combined
})() }}

assignments.name: style
assignments.value:
Objects retain detail regardless of camera distance — no simplification, no texture loss, no low-detail distant elements. Even far objects maintain clean outlines, visible structure, and readable forms. Consistent level of detail across the entire frame. Graphic-novel / cinematic comic illustration style inspired by The Walking Dead game (Telltale Games): bold, confident hand-inked outlines with variable line weight; sharp contour lines around characters and objects; stylized yet semi-realistic anatomy and grounded proportions; expressive faces with defined bone structure, angular shading and sculpted forms. Dramatic high-contrast lighting with strong cel-shaded shadow blocks; shadows rendered as solid, slightly textured ink planes rather than soft gradients. Muted, slightly desaturated color palette with controlled contrast — earthy browns, industrial grays, dusty blues, faded greens and restrained warm highlights. Subtle grain and light paper-like texture to emulate printed comic panels.

Crisp, fully detailed backgrounds — no depth-of-field blur, no bokeh, no soft focus. All planes (foreground, midground, background) remain sharp and clearly readable. Background elements retain line definition and structural clarity. Depth is created through tonal hierarchy, composition, and atmospheric value shifts — never through lens blur.


No white borders, no frame, no vignette, no panel edges. Full-bleed image composition.

No photorealism; painterly yet graphic finish. Looks like a high-budget narrative game cutscene or a mature motion-comic panel brought to life. Cinematic framing, strong perspective, structured composition, matte surfaces, no glossy 3D render, no anime influence.
